category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes Tabiew as a lightweight TUI application for viewing and querying tabular data files.
source_facts.description says it is a TUI to view and query tabular files including CSV, TSV, and Parquet.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title and README use Tabiew/tabiew for the project.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README is the best official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/shshemi/tabiew, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies CSV, TSV, Parquet viewing and querying in a TUI.
